name: Shaver Shop Group Limited
analysis: SSG has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 10% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Trade idea: entry A$1.3700, stop A$1.1930, target A$1.5162 (0.83:1) — then trail it.
